expectations.text: Output JSON contains entity_type = 'Company' and entity_subtype = 'Pty Ltd'
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json has entity_type = 'company' (lowercase, not 'Company') and no entity_subtype field at all. The company type is inferred only from the company_name string 'BERGVLIET PROPERTIES (PTY) LTD' and from the MOI fields_extracted.company_type = 'Private Company (Pty) Ltd', but no top-level entity_subtype key exists in the owner object.

expectations.text: CoR14.3 registration certificate is classified under CIPC bucket
expectations.evidence: registration_certificate.txt is classified with category = 'CIPC' and form_reference = 'CoR14.3'. Confirmed in both owner_classification.json (line 15-16) and summary.md table.

expectations.text: Both SA ID documents (Pieter and Annelie) are classified under FICA bucket
expectations.evidence: pieter_id.txt has category = 'FICA' and annelie_id.txt has category = 'FICA'. Both confirmed in owner_classification.json (lines 82 and 101) and the summary.md table.

expectations.text: Bank Confirmation Letter is classified under FICA bucket
expectations.evidence: bank_confirmation.txt has category = 'FICA' and document_type = 'Bank Confirmation Letter'. Confirmed in owner_classification.json (line 137) and summary.md table.

expectations.text: Directors list in extracted_data contains both VAN DER BERG directors
expectations.evidence: directors_notice.txt (CoR39) fields_extracted.directors contains both 'PIETER JOHANNES VAN DER BERG' (ID: 7503065023082) and 'ANNELIE VAN DER BERG' (ID: 7811190045087). Both listed in summary.md Directors table as well.

Registration number '2019/087432/07' appears in owner.registration_number, and is extracted in fields_extracted of registration_certificate.txt, moi.txt, directors_notice.txt, and tax_certificate.txt. Also confirmed in the cross_reference_checks section and summary.md.

expectations.text: FICA status is 'complete' — all required docs present
expectations.evidence: There is no top-level 'fica_status' field set to 'complete' in owner_classification.json. The completeness_check.overall_status is 'COMPLETE' (covering both FICA and CIPC combined), but no dedicated fica_status field exists. Individual FICA requirement checks all show 'PASS' but the assertion requires a field explicitly set to 'complete' for FICA.

expectations.text: CIPC status is 'complete' — CoR14.3, CoR39, and MOI all found
expectations.evidence: All three CIPC documents are present and classified: CoR14.3 (registration_certificate.txt, PASS), CoR39 (directors_notice.txt, PASS), and MOI/CoR15.1A (moi.txt, PASS). completeness_check.cipc_requirements all show PASS. overall_status = 'COMPLETE'. No dedicated cipc_status field, but all three required docs are confirmed found and passing.

expectations.text: No red flags raised (all docs valid and current)
expectations.evidence: completeness_check.flags = [] (empty array) and missing_documents = [] (empty array). All 8 documents have status = 'PASS'. The recommendation explicitly states all requirements are satisfied. summary.md 'Flags / Concerns' section states 'None identified.' The baseline correctly assessed all documents as valid and current.
